title: Ambiguous parameter description rewording
raw_changelog: Clarified description of the timeout parameter.
before_text:
## Execute Query

POST /v1/query

### Parameters
| name | type | description |
|------|------|-------------|
| query | string | SQL query to execute |
| timeout | integer | Query timeout in seconds. The query will be terminated if it exceeds this limit. |
after_text:
## Execute Query

POST /v1/query

### Parameters
| name | type | description |
|------|------|-------------|
| query | string | SQL query to execute |
| timeout | integer | Maximum execution time in seconds. Queries exceeding this duration may be cancelled. Results are not guaranteed after timeout. |
diff_text:
--- before
+++ after
@@ -7,4 +7,4 @@
 | query | string | SQL query to execute |
-| timeout | integer | Query timeout in seconds. The query will be terminated if it exceeds this limit. |
+| timeout | integer | Maximum execution time in seconds. Queries exceeding this duration may be cancelled. Results are not guaranteed after timeout. |

ground_truth.action_required: Review timeout handling. The rewording suggests queries 'may be cancelled' (not 'will be terminated') and results aren't guaranteed. This could indicate a behavior change.
ground_truth.confidence_notes: Ambiguous - could be just a wording clarification or could indicate a behavior change from guaranteed termination to possible cancellation
